# PERF-237 negative: tiny worksets run serially before fan-out
lang: go
file: PERF-237-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"

func ProcessItems(items []Item) error {
	if len(items) <= 2 {
		for _, item := range items {
			if err := work(item); err != nil {
				return err
			}
		}
		return nil
	}
	var group errgroup.Group
	group.SetLimit(8)
	for _, item := range items {
		item := item
		group.Go(func() error {
			return work(item)
		})
	}
	return group.Wait()
}

type Item struct{}

func work(Item) error { return nil }
